quick_skim.title: Performance-Driven Environment Abstraction with Multi-Timescale Learning
quick_skim.abstract: We study performance-driven environment abstraction for decision-making in large Markov decision processes. Rather than preserving geometric or topological structure, we seek abstractions that directly optimize decision quality. We model abstraction as a controlled approximation obtained by aggregating the state space and enforcing a shared action distribution within each aggregated state. For a fixed partition, we establish a performance guarantee that separates value-function approximation error from the loss introduced by action sharing. Guided by this analysis, we develop a multi-timescale reinforcement learning framework that jointly adapts the policy and a tree-structured environment abstraction. The resulting algorithm refines and coarsens regions of the state space based on Q-value discrepancies, balancing performance against abstraction size and complexity. Empirical results demonstrate substantial state compression, improved sample efficiency, and faster replanning compared to actor-critic baselines.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: proposes a general RL method for environment abstraction to improve decision-making, applicable to game AI training
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 提出一种通用的强化学习环境抽象方法以改进决策，可应用于游戏AI训练
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 提出一种通用的强化学习环境抽象方法以改进决策，可应用于游戏AI训练
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 提出一种通用的强化学习环境抽象方法以改进决策，可应用于游戏AI训练
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: A multi-timescale RL framework adapts tree-structured environment abstraction and policy jointly, optimizing decision quality via state aggregation with a performance guarantee.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 在大规模马尔可夫决策过程中，传统环境抽象方法侧重几何或拓扑保真度而非决策质量。本文提出性能驱动的环境抽象方法，通过状态聚合与动作共享直接优化决策性能，并设计多时间尺度强化学习框架联合调整策略与树结构抽象，理论上将价值近似误差与动作共享损失解耦，为在大状态空间中训练高效游戏智能体提供了通用算法支持。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 在大规模马尔可夫决策过程中，传统环境抽象方法侧重几何或拓扑保真度而非决策质量。本文提出性能驱动的环境抽象方法，通过状态聚合与动作共享直接优化决策性能，并设计多时间尺度强化学习框架联合调整策略与树结构抽象，理论上将价值近似误差与动作共享损失解耦，为在大状态空间中训练高效游戏智能体提供了通用算法支持。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: reinforcement learning techniques for training game AI

quick_skim.title: Reversal Q-Learning
quick_skim.abstract: Iterative generative modeling techniques, such as flow matching, provide powerful tools to model complex behaviors for effective offline reinforcement learning (RL). In this work, we propose a new off-policy RL algorithm that trains a flow policy based on prior data. Our idea starts from the "expanded" Markov decision process (MDP) framework, which treats individual flow refinement steps as separate actions in an MDP. To enable off-policy RL within this framework, we apply two techniques: we generate virtual on-policy trajectories (by "reversing" flows) to make this framework compatible with prior data, and we apply a bias-and-variance reduction technique to mitigate the curse of horizon in off-policy RL. We call the resulting algorithm Reversal Q-learning (RQL). RQL has several advantages over previous flow-based RL methods: it does not suffer from backpropagation through time, makes better use of the learned value function, and directly trains the full, expressive flow policy. Through our experiments on 50 challenging simulated robotic tasks, we show that RQL leads to the best average offline RL performance compared to state-of-the-art flow-based offline RL algorithms.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Proposes Reversal Q-learning, a new offline RL algorithm for training policies, applicable to game AI
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 提出可应用于游戏AI训练的离线RL算法Reversal Q-learning
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 提出可应用于游戏AI训练的离线RL算法Reversal Q-learning
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 提出可应用于游戏AI训练的离线RL算法Reversal Q-learning
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Reversal Q-learning, an offline RL algorithm that uses flow matching and virtual on-policy trajectories to improve sample efficiency and reduce bias/variance, with potential for training game agents.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对离线强化学习中策略外评估的偏差和方差问题，本文提出Reversal Q-learning算法。该算法将流模型的细化步骤视为扩展MDP中的动作，通过反转流生成虚拟在线轨迹以兼容离线数据，并引入偏差-方差减少技术。在连续控制任务上的实验验证了算法有效性，为离线RL提供了一种新的流策略训练方法。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对离线强化学习中策略外评估的偏差和方差问题，本文提出Reversal Q-learning算法。该算法将流模型的细化步骤视为扩展MDP中的动作，通过反转流生成虚拟在线轨迹以兼容离线数据，并引入偏差-方差减少技术。在连续控制任务上的实验验证了算法有效性，为离线RL提供了一种新的流策略训练方法。
